creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text:
I have some "good" news, and some "bad" news.

Bad news: I don't see influxdb2 ported any time soon.
Good news: influxdb3 is fully written in rust, meaning porting will be a lot easier with our existing infrastructure.

Is there interest in a "beta" influxdb3? As there are no releases cut yet upstream.
